reviewed_findings.reason: Debian classifies the Trixie issue as minor/no-DSA and has no Trixie fix. The exact v0.12.1 service's two direct AWS-LC sscanf call sites use fixed %lu and %lx formats, and neither the service nor its linked libcrypto contains the vulnerable %mc conversion. Re-review on a Trixie fix, a changed fingerprint, or any new scanf format or call path.

Debian classifies the Trixie issue as minor/no-DSA and has no Trixie fix. The exact v0.12.1 service and CEL worker do not import ungetwc; the libstdc++ object that does is outside both executable dependency closures. Re-review on a Trixie fix or any new C++ or wide-character input path.

Debian classifies the Trixie issue as minor/no-DSA and has no fixed upstream or Trixie version. The exact v0.12.1 service and CEL worker do not import the affected deprecated ns_printrrf, ns_printrr, or fp_nquery functions. Re-review on a fix or any new DNS TSIG debugging or printing path.
